mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sku WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sku (product_id, spec_name, price, member_price, duration, stock, sort) VALUES (#{productId}, #{specName}, #{price}, #{memberPrice}, #{duration}, #{stock}, #{sort})

INSERT INTO sku (product_id, spec_name, price, member_price, duration, stock, sort) VALUES
(#{item.productId}, #{item.specName}, #{item.price}, #{item.memberPrice}, #{item.duration}, #{item.stock}, #{item.sort})
